scripts.qa:test:e2e:json: mkdir -p logs && playwright test tests/e2e --reporter=json > logs/e2e-report.json
scripts.qa:test:api:json: mkdir -p logs && playwright test tests/api --reporter=json > logs/api-report.json
scripts.qa:test:all:json: npm run qa:test:smoke:json && npm run qa:test:critical:json && npm run qa:test:regression:json && npm run qa:test:e2e:json && npm run qa:test:api:json
scripts.qa:go:test: cd backend && GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build GOMODCACHE=/tmp/go-mod go test ./...
scripts.qa:go:test:coverage: mkdir -p logs && cd backend && GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build GOMODCACHE=/tmp/go-mod go test ./... -coverprofile=../logs/go-coverage.out -covermode=atomic -json > ../logs/go-test.json
